rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RENALD D. BACIGALUPI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum And For Expenses Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, AUGUST 27, 2008. Petitioner¿s Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum is moot as the witness has complied with the subpoena. Sanctions are denied as the proof of service does not show that personal service of the motion was made as required by C.R.C. 3.1025. =(EAH/612)
